words.hint: A famous sci-fi horror film about a creature in space.
words.definition: A 1979 science fiction horror film directed by Ridley Scott featuring a terrifying extraterrestrial creature.

words.hint: A blockbuster about a ship that sank.
words.definition: A 1997 epic romance film by James Cameron about the sinking of the RMS Titanic.

words.hint: A film set on the planet Pandora.
words.definition: A 2009 sci-fi epic by James Cameron set on the lush alien world of Pandora.

words.hint: An animated Disney film about an ice queen.
words.definition: A 2013 Disney animated musical fantasy about two royal sisters and a magical winter curse.

words.hint: A villain's origin story set in Gotham.
words.definition: A 2019 psychological thriller portraying the origin of Batman's nemesis, the Joker.

words.hint: A Hitchcock horror classic set in a motel.
words.definition: A 1960 Alfred Hitchcock horror film about a violent encounter at the Bates Motel.

words.hint: A classic wartime romance film.
words.definition: A 1942 romantic drama set during World War II in the Moroccan city of Casablanca.

words.hint: A Roman warrior fights for freedom in the arena.
words.definition: A 2000 epic action film about a Roman general turned slave who seeks revenge through gladiatorial combat.

words.hint: A film about entering people's dreams.
words.definition: A 2010 sci-fi thriller by Christopher Nolan about a thief who enters the subconscious minds of others.

words.hint: Astronauts travel through a wormhole to save Earth.
words.definition: A 2014 science fiction epic by Christopher Nolan about space exploration and the survival of humanity.

words.hint: A South Korean film about social class.
words.definition: A 2019 South Korean dark comedy thriller by Bong Joon-ho about class conflict between two families.

words.hint: Journalists uncover a major scandal.
words.definition: A 2015 drama about the Boston Globe's investigation into child abuse within the Catholic Church.

words.hint: Two astronauts struggle to survive in space.
words.definition: A 2013 survival thriller by Alfonso Cuarón about two astronauts stranded in outer space.

words.hint: A great white shark terrorizes a beach town.
words.definition: A 1975 Spielberg thriller about a deadly shark that attacks a small resort community.

words.hint: A WWII evacuation depicted in film.
words.definition: A 2017 historical war film by Christopher Nolan about the Dunkirk evacuation during World War II.

words.hint: Reality is a simulation in this sci-fi film.
words.definition: A 1999 science fiction film about a computer programmer who discovers reality is a simulated world.

words.hint: The story of the atomic bomb creator.
words.definition: A 2023 biographical thriller about J. Robert Oppenheimer and the development of the atomic bomb.

words.hint: A famous doll goes to the real world.
words.definition: A 2023 fantasy comedy film following Barbie's journey from Barbieland to the real world.

words.hint: A boy visits the Land of the Dead.
words.definition: A 2017 Pixar animated film about a young musician who enters the Land of the Dead to find his ancestor.

words.hint: A family haunted by dark secrets after a death.
words.definition: A 2018 horror film about a family that unravels dark secrets about their lineage after a tragedy.

words.hint: The process by which species change over time.
words.definition: The gradual process through which biological populations change over successive generations.

words.hint: The force that pulls objects toward Earth.
words.definition: A fundamental force of nature that attracts objects with mass toward one another.

words.hint: The smallest unit of a chemical element.
words.definition: The basic building block of matter, consisting of a nucleus surrounded by electrons.

words.hint: The path a planet takes around the sun.
words.definition: The curved path of a celestial body or spacecraft around a star, planet, or moon.

words.hint: The fourth state of matter.
words.definition: An ionized gas consisting of positive ions and free electrons, often found in stars.

words.hint: A particle of light.
words.definition: A massless elementary particle that is the quantum of electromagnetic radiation, including light.

words.hint: The complete set of genetic material in an organism.
words.definition: The complete set of DNA, including all of its genes, within an organism.

words.hint: The center of an atom or cell.
words.definition: The dense central region of an atom containing protons and neutrons, or the membrane-bound organelle in a cell.

words.hint: A substance that speeds up a chemical reaction.
words.definition: A substance that increases the rate of a chemical reaction without itself being permanently affected.

words.hint: Two or more atoms bonded together.
words.definition: A group of two or more atoms held together by chemical bonds, forming the smallest unit of a compound.

words.hint: A neutral particle found in the atomic nucleus.
words.definition: A subatomic particle found in the nucleus of an atom, carrying no electric charge.

words.hint: A measure of disorder in a system.
words.definition: A thermodynamic quantity representing the unavailability of a system's thermal energy for conversion into mechanical work.

words.hint: All living things in an environment and their interactions.
words.definition: A biological community of interacting organisms and their physical environment.

words.hint: Water moving through a membrane.
words.definition: The movement of water molecules through a semipermeable membrane from an area of low solute concentration to high.

words.hint: A substance that trains your immune system.
words.definition: A biological preparation that provides acquired immunity to a particular infectious disease.

words.hint: The preserved remains of ancient life.
words.definition: The preserved remains or traces of organisms from the remote past, found in rock or amber.

words.hint: An island nation in East Asia.
words.definition: An island country in East Asia, known for its unique culture, technology, and cherry blossoms.

words.hint: The world's largest tropical rainforest.
words.definition: The world's largest tropical rainforest, covering most of the Amazon basin in South America.

words.hint: The world's largest hot desert.
words.definition: The world's largest hot desert, covering much of North Africa.

words.hint: The highest mountain on Earth.
words.definition: The highest mountain on Earth, located in the Himalayas on the border between Nepal and Tibet.

words.hint: The longest river in Africa.
words.definition: The longest river in Africa, flowing northward through northeastern Africa into the Mediterranean Sea.

words.hint: A Nordic island nation near the Arctic.
words.definition: A Nordic island nation in the North Atlantic, known for its dramatic landscapes including volcanos and geysers.

words.hint: The region around the North Pole.
words.definition: The polar region around the Earth's North Pole, covered by the Arctic Ocean and surrounding land masses.

words.hint: A mountain that erupts with lava.
words.definition: An opening in Earth's crust through which lava, ash, and gases are expelled during eruptions.

words.hint: A deep gorge carved by a river.
words.definition: A deep gorge, typically one with a river flowing through it, carved by water over millions of years.

words.hint: A long narrow inlet in Scandinavia.
words.definition: A long, narrow, deep inlet of the sea between high cliffs, formed by glacial erosion in Scandinavia.

words.hint: One of the seven large landmasses on Earth.
words.definition: Any of the world's main landmasses: Africa, Antarctica, Asia, Australia, Europe, North America, and South America.

words.hint: A seasonal wind pattern bringing heavy rain.
words.definition: A seasonal reversing wind accompanied by corresponding changes in precipitation, common in South Asia.

words.hint: A vast treeless Arctic landscape.
words.definition: A vast, flat, treeless Arctic region where the subsoil is permanently frozen.

words.hint: A strip of land surrounded by water on three sides.
words.definition: A piece of land almost surrounded by water or projecting out into a body of water.

words.hint: A landform at a river's mouth.
words.definition: A landform that forms at the mouth of a river, where the river flows into an ocean, sea, lake, or another river.

words.hint: A flat-topped elevated landmass.
words.definition: A flat-topped area of land that is significantly raised above surrounding land on at least one side.

words.hint: An Italian dish with tomato sauce and cheese.
words.definition: A popular Italian dish consisting of a flat round bread topped with tomato sauce, cheese, and various toppings.

words.hint: A Japanese dish with rice and seafood.
words.definition: A Japanese dish of specially prepared vinegared rice combined with seafood, vegetables, or egg.

words.hint: An Italian staple made from dough.
words.definition: An Italian food made from a dough of wheat flour mixed with eggs or water, formed into various shapes.

words.hint: A Mexican dish in a folded tortilla.
words.definition: A traditional Mexican dish consisting of a tortilla folded around a filling of meat, vegetables, and salsa.

words.hint: A spiced dish from South Asia.
words.definition: A dish, originating in South Asian cuisine, of meat, vegetables, or fish cooked in a spicy sauce.

words.hint: A staple food baked from flour dough.
words.definition: A staple food made from a dough of flour and water, usually by baking, with various ingredients.

words.hint: A dairy product made from curdled milk.
words.definition: A food made from the pressed curds of milk, with hundreds of varieties in flavor and texture.

words.hint: A sweet substance made by bees.
words.definition: A sweet, viscous food substance produced by bees from the nectar of flowers.

words.hint: A sour yellow citrus fruit.
words.definition: A small yellow citrus fruit known for its acidic juice and aromatic rind.

words.hint: A pungent bulb used in cooking.
words.definition: A bulbous plant related to onions, widely used as a flavoring and seasoning in cooking.

words.hint: A tropical sweet yellow fruit.
words.definition: A large oval tropical fruit with a smooth skin, juicy orange-yellow flesh, and a large seed.

words.hint: Thin strips of dough used in many cultures.
words.definition: A type of food made from unleavened dough which is rolled flat and cut into long strips or other shapes.

words.hint: A fermented dairy product.
words.definition: A thick creamy food made from milk that has been curdled with bacteria, eaten plain or flavored.

words.hint: A pink-fleshed fish prized for flavor.
words.definition: A large edible fish that is a popular food source, known for its pink flesh and nutritional value.

words.hint: A creamy green fruit popular in salads.
words.definition: A tropical fruit with a rough dark-green skin and creamy, pale-green flesh rich in healthy fats.

words.hint: Fried balls of ground chickpeas.
words.definition: A Middle Eastern dish of small balls or patties made from ground chickpeas or fava beans, deep-fried.

words.hint: A Middle Eastern layered pastry with nuts.
words.definition: A sweet pastry made of layers of filo dough filled with chopped nuts and sweetened with honey or syrup.

words.hint: A crescent-shaped French pastry.
words.definition: A buttery, flaky French pastry named for its crescent shape, made from layered yeast-leavened dough.

words.hint: A Shakespeare tragedy about a Danish prince.
words.definition: A tragic play by William Shakespeare in which Prince Hamlet seeks revenge for his father's murder.

words.hint: An epic ancient Greek poem about a long journey home.
words.definition: An ancient Greek epic poem attributed to Homer, following Odysseus's journey home after the Trojan War.

words.hint: The Great... a symbol of the American Dream.
words.definition: The protagonist of F. Scott Fitzgerald's 'The Great Gatsby,' symbolizing the corruption of the American Dream.

words.hint: Bram Stoker's famous vampire count.
words.definition: The vampire count in Bram Stoker's 1897 Gothic horror novel of the same name.

words.hint: A white whale hunted by Captain Ahab.
words.definition: The great white whale in Herman Melville's novel 'Moby-Dick,' pursued obsessively by Captain Ahab.

words.hint: A 14-line poem with a specific rhyme scheme.
words.definition: A poem of 14 lines using any of a number of formal rhyme schemes, typically expressing a single theme.

words.hint: The most common form of long fiction.
words.definition: An invented prose narrative of considerable length and complexity, portraying characters and a plot.

words.hint: A short story with a moral lesson.
words.definition: A short story, typically with animals as characters, conveying a moral lesson.

words.hint: Writing that uses irony to criticize.
words.definition: The use of humor, irony, or exaggeration to expose and criticize people's stupidity or vices.

words.hint: A mournful poem, typically for the dead.
words.definition: A poem of serious reflection, typically a lament for the dead.

words.hint: A Japanese poem with 5-7-5 syllable structure.
words.definition: A traditional form of Japanese poetry with three short lines of 5, 7, and 5 syllables respectively.

words.hint: A figure of speech making an implicit comparison.
words.definition: A figure of speech in which a word or phrase is applied to an object to which it is not literally applicable.

words.hint: A statement that contradicts itself but may be true.
words.definition: A seemingly absurd or contradictory statement that when investigated proves to be true or significant.

words.hint: A story with a hidden symbolic meaning.
words.definition: A narrative in which characters and events are symbols representing aspects of real life or morality.

words.hint: An imagined society where everything is terrible.
words.definition: An imagined society that is undesirable or frightening, often portrayed in speculative fiction.

words.hint: A character speaking thoughts aloud alone on stage.
words.definition: An act of speaking one's thoughts aloud when alone or regardless of hearers, especially in theater.

words.hint: The antagonist or evil character in a story.
words.definition: A character in a story whose evil actions create conflict for the protagonist.

words.hint: The art of persuasive speaking or writing.
words.definition: The art of effective or persuasive speaking or writing, especially the exploitation of figures of speech.

words.hint: The world's most popular sport, played with a round ball.
words.definition: A team sport played with a round ball that players kick into the opposing team's goal.

words.hint: A racket sport played on a court with a net.
words.definition: A sport in which two or four players hit a ball with rackets over a net on a court.

words.hint: A combat sport using fists in a ring.
words.definition: A combat sport in which two opponents fight with gloved fists in a squared ring.

words.hint: A sport involving riding bicycles.
words.definition: The sport or activity of riding a bicycle, either as a recreation or competitively.

words.hint: A water sport using oars on a boat.
words.definition: The sport of propelling a boat by using oars, either in teams or individually.

words.hint: Riding ocean waves on a board.
words.definition: The sport of standing or lying on a surfboard and riding on the top of waves toward the shore.

words.hint: The sport of shooting arrows at a target.
words.definition: The sport or practice of shooting arrows with a bow at a target.

words.hint: A sword-fighting sport in a competitive setting.
words.definition: The sport of fighting with swords, especially foils, épées, or sabres, following a set of rules.

words.hint: Jumping into water with acrobatic skill.
words.definition: The sport of performing acrobatic dives into water from a springboard or platform.

words.hint: Gliding on ice or smooth surfaces with blades.
words.definition: The sport or activity of gliding on ice or a smooth surface while wearing skates.

words.hint: A race combining swimming, cycling, and running.
words.definition: An athletic contest consisting of three different events: typically swimming, cycling, and running.

words.hint: A 42-kilometer road running race.
words.definition: A long-distance running race covering approximately 42.195 kilometers, named after the Greek city Marathon.

words.hint: A bat-and-ball sport popular in England and India.
words.definition: A bat-and-ball game played between two teams of eleven players on a field.

words.hint: America's national pastime with a bat and ball.
words.definition: A bat-and-ball sport in which two teams take turns batting and fielding.

words.hint: Teams hit a ball over a high net.
words.definition: A game in which two teams hit an inflated ball over a high net, trying to ground it on the opponent's side.

words.hint: A Japanese martial art using strikes.
words.definition: A Japanese martial art using the hands, elbows, knees, and feet to deliver and block blows.

words.hint: A Japanese martial art focused on throws.
words.definition: A modern Japanese martial art using throws and grappling holds to subdue an opponent.

words.hint: A long orchestral composition in multiple movements.
words.definition: An elaborate musical composition for full orchestra, typically in four movements.

words.hint: The speed or pace of a musical piece.
words.definition: The speed at which a passage of music is or should be played, often indicated by terms like allegro.

words.hint: Multiple notes played at the same time.
words.definition: A group of notes sounded together, forming the basis of harmony in music.

words.hint: The main tune of a musical piece.
words.definition: A sequence of single notes that is musically satisfying and forms the principal element of a composition.

words.hint: The pattern of beats in music.
words.definition: A strong, regular, repeated pattern of sound or movement in music.

words.hint: A dramatic performance set entirely to music.
words.definition: A form of theater in which music has a leading role and the parts are taken by singers.

words.hint: A stringed instrument played by plucking or strumming.
words.definition: A musical instrument with six strings, played by plucking or strumming with the fingers or a pick.

words.hint: A large keyboard instrument struck with hammers.
words.definition: A large keyboard musical instrument with a wooden case enclosing a soundboard and metal strings struck by hammers.

words.hint: A bowed string instrument used in orchestras.
words.definition: A bowed stringed instrument of treble pitch, with four strings tuned in perfect fifths.

words.hint: A large group of musicians playing together.
words.definition: A large group of musicians playing various instruments together, typically including string, wind, and percussion sections.

words.hint: The basic rhythmic unit in music.
words.definition: A unit of musical rhythm, the basic pulse in music against which the performer plays or sings.

words.hint: A category or style of music, like jazz or pop.
words.definition: A category of musical composition characterized by a particular style, form, or content, such as jazz or blues.

words.hint: The repeated section of a song, sung by many voices.
words.definition: The part of a song that recurs at intervals, usually after each verse, often sung by a group.

words.hint: Notes that sound pleasant together.
words.definition: The combination of simultaneously sounded musical notes to produce chords and chord progressions with a pleasing effect.

words.hint: A slow, sentimental song that tells a story.
words.definition: A slow, sentimental musical piece that tells a story in verse form, typically relating to love.

words.hint: A rhythmic genre with strong bass and African-American roots.
words.definition: A music genre that emerged in the 1960s, characterized by a strong rhythmic groove and African-American cultural origins.

words.hint: An improvisational music genre from New Orleans.
words.definition: A type of music of Black American origin characterized by improvisation, syncopation, and usually a regular or forceful rhythm.

words.hint: A soulful music style expressing hardship.
words.definition: A type of music originating in the Deep South, characterized by blue notes and expressing feelings of sadness.

words.hint: A classical composition for one or two instruments.
words.definition: A classical composition for an instrumental soloist, often with a piano accompaniment, typically in three or four movements.
